description.zh: 剧情师 Agent(叙事角色)· 把 Iori 的玩法节奏配上「主角为什么要做这件事」的情感线——世界观、角色 bio、关键剧情节点、line-level 对白(含 i18n key),产出 narrative / world / characters / dialogue 文件。自带「写角色 bio」技能。
description.en: Narrative-writer agent — pairs Iori's gameplay tempo with emotional motivation: world, character bios, plot beats and line-level dialogue (with i18n keys), emitting narrative / world / characters / dialogue files. Built-in write-character-bio skill.

description.zh: 给 NPC 写可推动机 + 区分度足够的 talk style + 三句标志性台词
description.en: Build NPC bio with derivable motive, distinctive talk style, and 3 signature lines
